sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ);

INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, created_at) VALUES (1, 'abc', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00+00:00'), (2, NULL, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-02 00:00:00+00:00'), (3, '', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-03 00:00:00+00:00');
SELECT id, bit_length(name) AS name_bit_length FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bit_length(name) AS name_bit_length FROM (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE created_at < TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-02 00:00:00+00:00') AS subquery WHERE name <> '';
SELECT id, bit_length(name) AS name_bit_length FROM test_table WHERE bit_length(name) > 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, timestamp_col TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, timestamp_col) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00+00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-05 00:00:00+00:00');

SELECT t.id, t.name, (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-05 00:00:00+00:00' - MAX(a.timestamp_col)) AS time_diff FROM test_table t INNER JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id WHERE t.name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.id, t.name HAVING bit_length(t.name) = 24;

WITH time_diffs AS (SELECT t.id, (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-06 00:00:00+00:00' - a.timestamp_col) AS diff FROM test_table t LEFT JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id) SELECT id, bit_length(COALESCE(diff::TEXT, 'NULL')) AS null_handling FROM time_diffs WHERE diff IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bit_length(name) + 16 AS modified_bit_length FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND bit_length(name) - 2 < 10;
SELECT created_at, (SELECT bit_length(name) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS name_bit_length FROM test_table WHERE bit_length(name) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at;
